SEARCH
Package org.sim

Class RND

java.lang.Object
org.sim.RND
public class RND extends Object
Static utility class providing convenient helper methods for random number generation.

  • Constructor Summary

    Constructors
    Constructor
    Description
    RND()
     

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    static boolean
    Chance(float increaseTrue, float decreaseTrue)
    Returns true or false based on a customized probability scale.
    static boolean
    RandomBoolean()
    Generates a random boolean.
    static float
    RandomFloat(float min, float max)
    Generates a random decimal float number between a minimum and a maximum value range.
    static processing.core.PVector
    RandomVector2(float minX, float maxX, float minY, float maxY)
    Generates a random 2D vector coordinate within specified boundary box coordinates.
    static float
    Scale(float value, float maxValue)
    Scales a raw number down to a proportional value based on a maximum limit.
    static float
    Scale(float value, float maxValue, float modifier)
    Scales a raw number and applies an extra weight multiplier factor.

    Methods inherited from class java.lang.Object

    clone, equals, finalize, getClass, hashCode, notify, notifyAll, toString, wait, wait, wait

  • Constructor Details

    • RND

      public RND()

  • Method Details

    • Chance

      public static boolean Chance(float increaseTrue, float decreaseTrue)
      Returns true or false based on a customized probability scale. increaseTrue+decreaseTrue should be in a range of -10 to 10.

    • Scale

      public static float Scale(float value, float maxValue)
      Scales a raw number down to a proportional value based on a maximum limit.

    • Scale

      public static float Scale(float value, float maxValue, float modifier)
      Scales a raw number and applies an extra weight multiplier factor.

    • RandomVector2

      public static processing.core.PVector RandomVector2(float minX, float maxX, float minY, float maxY)
      Generates a random 2D vector coordinate within specified boundary box coordinates.

    • RandomFloat

      public static float RandomFloat(float min, float max)
      Generates a random decimal float number between a minimum and a maximum value range.

    • RandomBoolean

      public static boolean RandomBoolean()
      Generates a random boolean.
